reason: Browser use feature successfully navigates to a URL, retrieves the page title, and returns the correct result
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Gamut home page with agent list
Clicked on the "QA-20260722-010127-ghqb" agent in the sidebar - Successfully opened the agent chat interface
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat textbox - Message was successfully entered
Sent the message by pressing Ctrl+Enter - Message was successfully sent, page URL changed to session URL, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent to complete (monitoring "Working..." indicator) - Agent completed in approximately 14 seconds (well within 3-minute limit)

Took final screenshot of agent response - Response successfully displayed with confirmation: "The page title is 'Example Domain'. Closing the browser now." and "The page at https://example.com has the title 'Example Domain'."
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - VERIFIED: The response explicitly mentions "Example Domain" twice, confirming the browser navigation and page title retrieval were successful
